questions.question: What happens when you reassign a property on a reactive() object in Vue 3?
options: Vue logs a warning and ignores the change
The Proxy's set trap intercepts it and triggers updates
You must use Vue.set() like in Vue 2

questions.question: Which operation DOES break reactivity on a reactive() object?
options: Adding a new property to the object
Reassigning the entire variable to a new object

questions.question: What is the recommended way to replace all properties on a reactive object without breaking reactivity?
